content:
# Abu Gabra Formation

**Summary**: A sedimentary formation in the Muglad Basin containing lacustrine and fluvio-deltaic deposits.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017]] characterized the Abu Gabra Formation as a primary reservoir rock.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017]] lacustrine and fluvio-deltaic systems

## Reservoir Properties

- [[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017]] TOC 1.45-5.15 wt%

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Contains fluvio-deltaic sandstones as primary reservoir rocks and lacustrine shales as source rocks. ([[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017, p. 1]])

## Conflicting Interpretations Across Sources

- [[2017-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2017]] Dissolution of feldspars/micas, cementation, quartz overgrowths.
